relations: The ancient Olympic Games were held in Olympia
The ancient Olympic Games were held in honor of Zeus

The Olympic Games, both in their ancient form and the first modern iteration, have a deep-rooted connection with Greece. Greece not only played host to the ancient Olympics but also proudly hosted the first modern Olympic Games in 1896. This event marked a revival of the Olympic tradition that dates back to ancient times, re-establishing Greece's pivotal role in the history and development of the Olympic movement.
Theodosius abolished the ancient Olympic Games
Pierre de Coubertin founded the modern Olympic Games

The Olympic Games, a renowned international multi-sport event, had its first modern iteration hosted by Athens in 1896. This historic city in Greece played a pivotal role in reviving the ancient tradition of the Olympic Games, establishing itself as the birthplace of the modern Olympics.
The 1936 Berlin Olympics were used by Nazi Germany for propaganda
The 1980 Moscow Olympics faced a boycott due to the Soviet Union's actions
The Olympic Games originated in Ancient Greece, marking the beginning of the tradition
Nazi Germany used the 1936 Berlin Olympics for propaganda purposes
The Soviet Union's invasion of Afghanistan led to a boycott of the 1980 Moscow Olympics
The 1980 Moscow Olympics were boycotted due to the Soviet Union's invasion of Afghanistan
